speaker: MATT
raw_text: Also guys, as a note, we have, available tonight for the person, for people who have managed to get themselves to 2,150 subscribers tonight, we will send out another promo kit to one of you folks in the chat with another signed picture of our Critical Role cast. So be sure to see if we can get the subscribers to climb up as well, so keep an eye out for that in the evening so we can give out one of those before the night is over. That would be awesome.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let us know in the chat guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait wait wait, I've got some thing. I just gave everyone in the party rupees, treasure!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Rupees!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: These were sent to me by Tim West who has a great new company called Fantasy Coin HQ. If you go to fantasycoinhq.com he makes - Matt's holding up a dwarven coin at the moment - they make gems, they make fantasy coins, nerd coins.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are we doing free ads now for people?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is just a thank you!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is a thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Check it out. Or if you just hit a really tall tuft of grass with a sword, these will pop out of it so you don't have to order them. Just mow your lawn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They’re hefty, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: If these were rupees, this is what they would feel like.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I kind of want to throw them at people across the room!

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I want to trade them, put them in a pouch.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys also just woke up about 2, 3 hours ago.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I was just so out of it last time. Have we rested? Are we in some need of rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should probably rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What are we around? What's near us? Is this just a tunnel? Is there any sort of shelter, caves?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're by that lake with the giant monster.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We circled all the way back around.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And went down to that place that you told us not to go in the first place? Yeah, that's where we ended up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How was that for you? (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So essentially there was--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're back in the camp.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're under the camp. You're where the giant chasm leads down into the waterfall. There is a pool of water at the bottom where the aboleth was in the water.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We just barely survived the chat room and now we need to rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (chuckles) The chatroom. Take it easy on us, all right?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys can take a short rest and use your hit dice to heal up. You didn't take any damage last game. Thankfully you stayed out of the fray.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should probably rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What are we around? What's near us? Is this just a tunnel? Is there any sort of shelter, caves?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're by that lake with the giant monster.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We circled all the way back around.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And went down to that place that you told us not to go in the first place? Yeah, that's where we ended up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How was that for you? (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So essentially there was--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're back in the camp.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're under the camp. You're where the giant chasm leads down into the waterfall. There is a pool of water at the bottom where the aboleth was in the water.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We just barely survived the chat room and now we need to rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (chuckles) The chatroom. Take it easy on us, all right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys also just woke up about 2, 3 hours ago.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Right, so we don't really - oh, we can take hit points.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Only thing of note. So the rest of you who need to heal up can use this time to take a short rest and use your hit dice to heal up on your own.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And went down to that place that you told us not to go in the first place? Yeah, that's where we ended up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How was that for you? (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So essentially there was--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're back in the camp.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're under the camp. You're where the giant chasm leads down into the waterfall. There is a pool of water at the bottom where the aboleth was in the water.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We just barely survived the chat room and now we need to rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (chuckles) The chatroom. Take it easy on us, all right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys also just woke up about 2, 3 hours ago.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Right, so we don't really - oh, we can take hit points.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys can take a short rest and use your hit dice to heal up. You didn't take any damage last game. Thankfully you stayed out of the fray.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So I'm okay. That's all I need to know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You did use one of your Dominate spells.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: (laughs) It’s been a week.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So we never went up to the war camp and through it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You did.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh we did!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We crashed down by the tunnel, we fled. We sealed up the way behind us, ran in.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Got it. So we should keep going? We should just keep going. Magma? Follow the magma.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well I recommend. We don't want to go up and through the camp again?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No no no, we're going into the cavern.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So we're going to backtrack the way we came to that war camp road, yes?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, we're going into the tunnel.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Did you see the visual aid?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yes, we are going into the lava tunnel.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No no no, in through the tunnel.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I’ll just follow. I thought I understood.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You get about 20 or 30 minutes deeper into this tunnel before the sweltering heat gets noticeably warmer and as you crest a slight incline and decline over a small hill portion of this tunnel, you can see now a large portion of the rock has collapsed on the left side and a gargantuan pool of magma is pooling into the tunnel, essentially covering half of the tunnel you are traversing down. It can be walked on the side of safely at about 2 or 3 at shoulder width, but you only have about a 15 foot width here and the rest of it is just extremely bright, hot, molten rock.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll just have to use my imagination.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: A gentleman's offer, yes. That's what we'll call it from now on.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What permission?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Onward.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Pressing further down, the air itself that once had a kind of a hint of that sulfur smell, is now becoming stronger and stronger as you step deeper and deeper into this cavernous tunnel. It rests about 30 feet to 40 feet at width and about 25, 30 feet up and it varies to come pinched tighter or wider at moments, but it continues to be a steady downward climb in a continuous direction. The small trickles, some of them pool and gather into these small, magma cups if you will. Molten hot magma, I knew it was coming.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: (murmurs) I was just wondering if it would happen.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, that's minus 200 experience points. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I feel a bit weaker now.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 21! All right. You take a moment, and about 30 to 40 feet, you go through and inspect the way the terrain's been pushed and the dirt has been shoved aside. Tracking footprints and scuff marks on the rock and the walls nearby, seeing if any of the flows have been interrupted recently, and you ascertain that there is actually a pretty continuous patrol through here. About once every 4 to 8 hours up and down this tunnel that contain anywhere from 5 to 10 or more duergar, sometimes other, larger creatures. You find footprints that resemble maybe the ogres you mentioned earlier, possible troll footprints, but you're not familiar with that entity. You also notice some of the walls have what looks like small, localized cave-ins, almost as if something had burrowed through at one time or another.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Just a water bottle.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: So yes, Scanlan, we're fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's good to know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So, should we try to cross this little path here?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That sounds cool!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's really cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I use my tracking to see any of those duergar? To see if any of them have passed through the area; if there's a large group of them ahead of us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I can use my tracking and my favored terrain to see how many within 6 miles, if there's a large group of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes you can. All right. Go ahead and roll for your tracking check on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: First roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I believe it's survival.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ooh! Here we go!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do it for the Star Wars trailer.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Roll. Roll. Roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is with advantage, I believe, because it's your favored terrain, correct?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Your favored terrain!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, that's better. Is that it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Survival.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you continue tracking down this tunnel - and it takes you a good 3 or 4 hours to finally reach a point where the tunnel begins to widen up - you assess that, maybe 3 miles up, there is a localized town. Or, at least, a population of duergar amassed in a central place.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Awesome. Great.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Large, large creatures. So, there's also things that exist outside of the tunnel system.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Like Tremors?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So, as quickly as possible, we should get through these tunnels, I assume?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Probably a good idea. As a note though, you said within 6 miles?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 6 miles?!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Picking up on the shortcomings of a handful of members of your group, you do manage to maintain what you feel is a fairly stealthy advance deeper into this tunnel system. About an hour and a half of perpetual travel, as the tunnel slowly widens further and further, with every quarter mile or so, you eventually get to a point where the tunnel shoots open into a gargantuan cavern. A chamber nearly a mile and a half across from this visual point.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Check out the brain on Brad!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So 3 to 4 miles up, you said, from where we are at this point?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. From where you began.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Should we be stealthing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should probably start stealthing at this point, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes. I was about to say I'd like to move ahead of the group a bit and start sneaking along.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Let's do that! Go ahead and roll stealth.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do I have advantage like my sister had for--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do not.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No. All right, well--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Should we all try to stealth?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 26 for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This would be a group stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 26. I've tiptoed away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (laughs)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's hard to tell from this distance, unfortunately. You'd have to get closer up to see. About an hour of travel around the side--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm looking for doors and stuff as we go. I don't know why.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure! Looking for doors!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, there's a trap door somewhere, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: (old man voice) There’s doors in them there caves.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Good thinking.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That'll be the fortress, maybe, but--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Possibly. Could be farther. Can we see the molten things that he was talking about? The lava flows?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Still too far away.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Still too far away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you begin to make your way around, you're just starting to get to the point where you can see the front of the fortress. And you can see where the magma fall splits and just coalesces around each side of the stronghold. Almost like a blanket waterfall on each side. It does split up at certain points, you can begin to start making it out.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Where does the magma runoff lead to? Does it just pour out? Does it fill a moat?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The state of the blood that you see around seems to indicate that this has transpired over some time. You're guessing probably within a few days, if not a week, since this happened.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can stop.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: An arm?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan. Shh.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What? What?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (whispering) You're singing.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I was singing? (whispering) I was singing? I didn't even know! It's a force of habit!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to see if I can see anything in the area that has done this recently.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is the arm attached to whatever did--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Investigation check?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: --Is the arm part of a dead thing or is it alive?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's on the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm pretty sure whatever it is, it's dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I check it out as well? I mean, I'm there, I might as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can also attempt to make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Clever. There you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, I'm doing advantage, too, just in case. Okay, that one's better.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I can get advantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You get advantage on investigation?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, I got it because I'm fucking in my favored terrain. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You walk up in this terrain.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Best you can tell, the last time it was here was about two or three days ago, to feast on more of the remains.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (gasps) It's that big creature that - it was like one of those things that that thing put together, like--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And you see what seem like strange strikes through the sand, like someone had been dragged very quickly in a very localized spot, scattered all about.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a human centipede.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It is. It's a human centipede.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a very strange pattern that you can't really grasp what kind of creature would make it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And it seems like it was here recently, or a while ago?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Having been underground for what probably amounts now to four or five days, that little taste of ale on your lips is a very welcoming and very refreshing sensation.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Take it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I like gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One of them contains a handful of gems.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ooh!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Gems.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, those right there. So you can mark that down, until you get a chance to appraise them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't think we want to tangle with this. What are we trying to prove? Let's just keep trucking.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm really bad at stealthing, we should go. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We should leave.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Also, put the accordion back in the bag, all right?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Was I doing that? It's force of habit, I don't - it's like breathing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we're going to go back to the group, I'm going to bring the arm.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I take out the cask of ale and pour a little tankard of ale, just because I'm bored.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Have a sip sip.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Good man. Well done. It's very tasty.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Would anyone else like a sip? Keyleth?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yes, it is now a poisoned property.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: An attack roll? Which is?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Using your spell modifier as the attack bonus.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh. That ain't gonna do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Total of 10?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I think so. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What'd you roll?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I rolled a 2, and then I have a plus 8.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That ain't no good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It was a good idea though.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It was such a good idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The celestial lasso, which you don't get the feeling poison is something you could really muster based on your deity's central good--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I was just kidding! I was just getting a little crazy with ideas.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I like it. However, as it heads over the wall, you see it does not find purchase on the duergar. It instead finds purchase on part of the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Poisoning the wall effectively.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's getting its shot at you. That is a 17 versus armor class.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (hums Dueling Banjos)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh! I attack him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Pew pew.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Pew pew!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a 1.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Damn it! What is wrong with us?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What in the hot and holy shit is happening right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What are we doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's your first attack?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: My first attack is a serious fail. My second attack, though, is a 25.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's pretty cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So the first one you pull back, and as you pull back the actual arrow snaps.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You almost shot me!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ow, that hurt my arm so bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you're gonna have a little rash there probably tomorrow.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Great. 8.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 8 damage, all right. Your second arrow manages to find its mark. As it sticks pretty close to where the first arrow hit, or where he was shot from the Bad News. The duergar just shrugs it off angrily, and aims his crossbow from once on Percy, now onto you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (nervously) Haha.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I think as you guys just entered the stronghold, we'll take this as an intermission break. So take a little over 10 minutes. We'll watch the rest of the videos here again, and we'll return as the party has just entered the Emberhold itself.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Whoa!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're all very crammed in, to get anywhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Into this (high voice) teeny-tiny little room.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Feels like an intermission room.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. A bathroom break room?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes. We could all relieve ourselves in this room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys all slowly push into this storage room. It's very musty. It hasn't seen use in quite a while. In fact, you can see a little bit of mold is growing on the side of one of the barrels in the corner.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, dank.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is a doorway that is closed on the opposite side of this wall, and from what you can see, there is a stairway that curves upwards to the second floor.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ooh!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Guys, I'm sensing a lot of purple and brown construction paper here. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I am as well, Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's your favored terrain, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It is. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can we take an intermission break at this moment?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: He's coming into this room. Clarota just steps back, along the side of the stairs and out of view. A few moments pass as the footsteps slowly trail off.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Eww, Keyleth. All kinds of nastiness.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I find a corner of a cell and slowly pull out my gun.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I’m going savage! (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I should make sure all the doors are shut, not locked.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, all the doors are shut. Pike, anything you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm just, you know, preparing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just kicking it, just chilling.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do we need to move out of the way of the stairs?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Vax is scooching Scanlan out of the way to take that position right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The bear is at the back cell.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan, where are you?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There's voices coming from the stairs?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, someone's coming.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But there's a bear in the stairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, Trinket's coming down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I call, "Trinket, Trinket, Trinket (kissing SFX) Trinket!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Trinket barely hears you from way over at the side.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (kissing SFX) Come on.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The fresher wounds seal up, the blood flow comes to a stop. You see her muscles tense for a moment - her tension in her muscles relax for a minute. She looks to you for a second and says, "It's been a while since I've heard a song. Thank you."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: How hurt is she?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If I may.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's pretty rough. As you look up, she's not clothed. Her body is just a spray of scars and gashes and rake marks. She's been tortured to an extent you hadn't seen in person, and to still be tensing her muscles against the chains and looking at you with this intensity, if this is indeed Lady Kima, you now see why she's made the reputation she has.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Grog, the locking mechanism on this is jammed.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So, I step forward and I pull out my flute and I sing, (singing) "As long as I got my song and flute, I'm gonna give some healing to you. Love and magic in the air tonight, gonna give you some hit points. Gonna give you some hit points, gonna give you some hit points of our love." (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Dadadanana, okay. I roll 9 hit points.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The fresher wounds seal up, the blood flow comes to a stop. You see her muscles tense for a moment - her tension in her muscles relax for a minute. She looks to you for a second and says, "It's been a while since I've heard a song. Thank you."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If I may.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

She's been tortured to an extent you hadn't seen in person, and to still be tensing her muscles against the chains and looking at you with this intensity, if this is indeed Lady Kima, you now see why she's made the reputation she has.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Grog, the locking mechanism on this is jammed.

preceding_turns.text: Okay. So, I step forward and I pull out my flute and I sing, (singing) "As long as I got my song and flute, I'm gonna give some healing to you. Love and magic in the air tonight, gonna give you some hit points. Gonna give you some hit points, gonna give you some hit points of our love." (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Dadadanana, okay. I roll 9 hit points.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I know. It's part of the fun. And we're every Thursday, 7 o'clock, 7PM Pacific Standard Time. Usually we run about 2 and a half, 3 hours, our game sessions. So please come watch every Thursday. We love to have you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Nice!

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: And tomorrow we're having a special party to celebrate our reaching 2000 subscribers.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. That's awesome. (Cheering and clapping)

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: You guys are all welcome to stop by.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We might just do that. Awesome.

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: It's from 7 to 9 we'll have a band playing, we're gonna do some fun group games. Probably play some inappropriate Cards Against Humanity. And Super Fight and stuff like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As if there was appropriate Cards Against Humanity.

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: Every time I break it out, I'm like, I should never do this. (all laugh)
